name: New Hanover County Schools
districtFact: New Hanover County Schools serves Wilmington and coastal New Hanover County communities, including families who may need to compare traditional, year-round, restart, early college, technical high school, and Pre-K calendars.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for New Hanover County Families
content: Use the traditional NHCS calendar for most K-12 students unless your school or program follows a year-round, restart, early college, technical high school, or Pre-K calendar.
Add teacher workdays, vacation days, holidays, and the last-day half day to family calendars before planning childcare or travel.
Check the official NHCS printable calendars page before finalizing plans because several program calendars are published separately.

compareIntro: Compare the traditional calendars for NHCS and other North Carolina districts. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which New Hanover County Schools calendar should families use?
districtFaqs.a: Most NHCS students follow the traditional calendar shown on this page. Year-round schools, restart year-round schools, Isaac Bear Early College High School, Wilmington Early College High School, Southeast Area Technical High School, and Pre-K programs publish separate calendars.

districtFaqs.q: Can New Hanover County Schools calendar dates change after approval?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. Board decisions, weather, or instructional-time requirements can affect the calendar. Families should check the official NHCS printable calendars page and school announcements before making critical plans.

districtFaqs.q: How should families read teacher workdays and vacation days?
districtFaqs.a: Designated teacher workdays, undesignated teacher workdays, vacation days, and listed holidays are no-school dates for students when they fall inside the traditional student calendar. MySchoolDates simplifies those labels when the main impact for families is student attendance.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute NHCS calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official New Hanover County Schools printable calendars page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with NHCS.

relatedDistricts.name: Cumberland County Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Nearby southeastern North Carolina district with a different traditional calendar and break pattern.

relatedDistricts.name: Johnston County Public Schools
relatedDistricts.comparisonNote: Raleigh-area district useful for comparing eastern North Carolina school calendars.
